summary: Iteration 41 — verified all 4 newly-shipped features: URL-aware airport landings (/airport, /sjc/, /sfo/, /oak-airport-transfer), World Cup metadata, UTM tracking (frontend localStorage + backend persistence), and Android badge on /download. 4/4 backend pytest cases pass; 5/5 frontend Playwright assertions pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 4,829 lines — over the 700-line guideline. Bookings, quotes, admin, scheduler, safety scoring all share one module. Consider splitting into routers/ packages for maintainability (existing routes/admin.py is a good start).

weekly_digest preview/send endpoints are auth-gated (require_admin) but the rate of expensive aggregation queries should be cached or rate-limited so a compromised admin token can't DOS the DB by repeatedly hitting /preview.
test_credentials: Admin auth was NOT exercised in this iteration — only the 401 gate of weekly-digest endpoints was verified, plus direct python invocation of build_weekly_digest_data() against the live db (returned all 11 required keys: bookings_created, bookings_paid, total_revenue, top_sources, top_vehicles, top_routes, quotes_received, quotes_won, quote_to_win_rate, quote_sources, risk_distribution + a few extras: generated_at, period_start, period_end, quotes_quoted, revenue_by_source).
seed_data_creation: Test created + cleaned up 1 quote_request and 1 booking with utm.gclid='abc123-test'/'booking-test-456' — both removed in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter41_features.py covers weekly-digest auth gating + UTM persistence on quote_requests and bookings. Reuse for regression. Note: BookingCreate requires service_type in ['Airport Transfer','A to B Transfer','Hourly Chauffeur'] and vehicle_type from a fixed list ('Executive Sedan', etc.) — early drafts of the test used lowercase 'airport'/'sedan' and 422'd. Full admin auth flow (with 2FA) was NOT walked end-to-end this iteration; if next iteration needs to validate the authenticated weekly-digest response shape, the data shape was already proven via direct python call (all 11 required keys present).

verifications.airport_landings: All 4 routes return correct testid + page title + H1 + SJC-specific pillar 'Live SJC Flight Tracking' present.
verifications.world_cup_metadata: Title='Levi\'s Stadium Limo · Bay Area World Cup 2026 Transportation — TuranEliteLimo'; H1 contains 'Levi\'s Stadium' and 'World Cup 2026'.
verifications.utm_frontend: ?utm_source=google&utm_campaign=test&gclid=xyz789 → localStorage.tel_utm_v1 set with source_bucket='google_ads' + captured_at. Subsequent navigation with facebook utm did NOT overwrite (first-touch preserved).
verifications.utm_backend: POST /api/quote-requests and POST /api/bookings both persist utm dict to MongoDB verbatim (verified via direct mongo query in test).
verifications.weekly_digest_auth: GET/POST /api/admin/weekly-digest/{preview,send} both return 401 unauthenticated. Data shape (via direct python invocation): all 11 documented keys present.
verifications.download_android: /download renders both badges as active links. Android badge href=https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.turanelitelimo.app, no 'coming soon' text, no grayscale class, both iPhone+Android QR codes visible.
